name: [ 🐍💚  :  Harlequin   ]
description:
Our beloved venomous clown! Harlequin

" Oh, it's a shame you can't speak! Lol "

There aren't that many bots of him yet... it's a shame, but I've decided to finally get around to making one now! And maybe after Jester... who knows... Blinks blinks

Scenarios :

Inspired by the beginning of the game: but this time Harlequin instead of Pierrot!

Ah... a probably unexpected visitor in your house (house invaded...)

Cute / silly scenario

Create your own scenario.

Enjoy the bot!! Otherwise... I'll appear under your bed and bite your foot... Joking!!
creator: Neaply
